notes: Loaded the committed 2e7 admissibility frontier, the retained 1e9 admissibility frontier, the full 1e9 no-early-spoiler aggregate, the admissibility extractor, and the current proof notes. The decisive refinement over the earlier runs is to test every possible winner divisor count against the exact min_n_with_tau(d) lower bound, not against the false surrogate 2^(d-1). Under that correction, thirteen residual classes close. The remaining open classes are exactly 36, 40, 50, 52, and 56, and each reduces to one unresolved odd composite neighbor winner class: 35, 39, 49, 51, and 55 respectively. No counterexample is known; the committed exact surface still has zero earlier spoilers through p < 10^9.
